top_categories.workout_context: 6,500ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Granfondo Leiria Region – Sico Lands' demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before March.
At mile 60 of 92, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
71ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Granfondo Leiria Region – Sico Lands. Train it until it feels boring.
Granfondo Leiria Region – Sico Lands' mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 92 miles.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 92 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 6,500ft of climbing on mixed terrain does to your power file on race day.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 92 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
At Granfondo Leiria Region – Sico Lands, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on mixed terrain. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Tempo is Granfondo Leiria Region – Sico Lands' race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 92 miles on mixed terrain. Train it until it's automatic.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Granfondo Leiria Region – Sico Lands’s 92 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Granfondo Leiria Region – Sico Lands. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on VO2max, Race Simulation, and Durability to prepare you for 92 miles of mixed terrain in Pombal, Portugal.
